regions.name: The Stone Heights
regions.terrain: Rocky highlands, pine forests, cold streams

regions.name: The Riverlands
regions.terrain: River valleys, highland borders, fertile lowlands

regions.name: The Saltfen
regions.terrain: River delta, coastal lowlands, salt marshes

landmarks.name: The Confluence
landmarks.description: Where three highland streams (Cold Run, Ashwater, Piney Flow) converge to form the Millrun River

landmarks.name: Cold Run
landmarks.description: Highland stream flowing from Ironhollow south to The Confluence

landmarks.name: Ashwater
landmarks.description: Highland stream flowing from the north into The Confluence

landmarks.name: Piney Flow
landmarks.description: Highland stream flowing from the northeast into The Confluence

landmarks.name: Millrun River
landmarks.description: Major river flowing from The Confluence through The Riverlands to the delta

landmarks.name: The Pull
landmarks.description: Mysterious supernatural current that appears in the river delta during low water

landmarks.name: North Barracks
landmarks.description: Ironhollow boarding house where Senna Kade organizes contract miners

landmarks.name: Halfway Burn Site
landmarks.description: Abandoned charcoal production site along Cold Run, secret meeting location for Highland Workers Coalition

landmarks.name: Timber Yards
landmarks.description: Charcoal kilns south of Ashcrag where Orrin Pike organizes tenant farmers

landmarks.name: Harth Estate
landmarks.description: Largest farm in The Stone Heights, controlling a third of highland grain exports

settlements.name: Ironhollow
settlements.description: Mining camp supplying highland forge iron, controlled by cartel

settlements.name: Ashcrag
settlements.description: Highland market town at the Millrun headwaters with forge industry

settlements.name: Millford
settlements.description: Trading town at a river ford with three competing mills

settlements.name: Saltmere
settlements.description: Delta port town, grain market hub, and salt production center
